case_title: ALEJANDRO DIAZ RUVALCABA VS. DOMITELA GUTIERREZ

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUVALCABA, ALEJANDRO DIAZ AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, DOMITELA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DOMITILA GUTIERREZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DOMITILA GUTIERREZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 17, 2010 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE ENDORSED-FILED COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS IN CONFORMITY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION, 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DOMITILA GUTIERREZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE ENDORSED FILED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN CONFORMITY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) AND THIS COURT'S 12/14/10 RULING. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321 (301/PJB)
